ticket_goal: Enable automated E2E authentication for Playwright tests (Local Only, Real User ID)

Added aria-labels and data-testid to TemplateManager for better accessibility and testing.
Updated auth-reuse.spec.ts locators to match actual rendered account names.
Hardened settings.spec.ts by resolving strict mode violations and fixing dialog handling.
Verified all 8 E2E tests are passing consistently.
